response:
Gerald Grosvenor, 6th Duke of Westminster was succeeded by Hugh Grosvenor, 7th Duke of Westminster. According to the context, Hugh Grosvenor is described as "the third child and only son of Gerald Grosvenor, 6th Duke of Westminster and his wife Natalia Phillips Grosvenor, Duchess of Westminster." He inherited the title of Duke of Westminster on 9 August 2016, on the death of his father.

As for the estimated wealth, the context states: "He is estimated to be worth US$13 billion, making him the world's richest person aged under 30."

Thus, the British aristocrat who succeeded Gerald Grosvenor and is estimated to be worth US$13 billion is **Hugh Grosvenor, 7th Duke of Westminster**.
